challenge.explanation:
Pronađi ključne reči koje ukazuju na svrhu e-pošte Boba.

Our first weekly meeting... is scheduled for Friday morning at 9:00 AM – Ovo potvrđuje da je e-mail o zakazivanju sastanka.

We'll go over the timeline, the prototype status, and the next steps – Ovo objašnjava šta će biti diskutovano na sastanku.

Looking forward to seeing you all! – Ovo naglašava da je glavni fokus okupljanje tima za zakazane diskusije.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.

questions.text:
Baada ya mazungumzo na Linda, Bob alituma barua pepe kwa timu.

Hi team,

I hope you're all doing well. Our first weekly meeting to review the mobile app project progress is scheduled for Friday morning at 9:00 AM. We'll go over the timeline, the prototype status, and the next steps for the design sketches and wireframes.

As we discussed, Linda will lead the UX design, and I'll be the one to coordinate with the developers. We'll also need to allocate tasks for the next phase, especially around the front-end design.

I'm excited to hear everyone's updates, and I'm confident these regular check-ins will help us stay focused and meet our deadlines. Looking forward to seeing you all!

Best,

Bob

Koja je glavna e-mail adresa Boba?

answers.answer: Promene u projektu u vezi sa novom mobilnom aplikacijom.
answers.feedback: U imejlu nema novosti o projektu, jer on još nije započeo.
Email nije spomenuo zapošljavanje više članova tima.
U imejlu se ukratko pominju skice dizajna, ali glavna tema su sastanak i pregled napretka.

challenge.title: Vežba 48
